title: Converted: Samsara and Nirvana
description: Structured text conversion of legacy contentData[98]. The original legacy slide remains available for comparison.

slides.title: Samsara and Nirvana
slides.body:
Greed is trying to create what isn't.
Hate is trying to destroy what is.
This is samsara.
Delusion is believing in this.

Peace is allowing what isn't not to be.
Love is allowing what is to be.
This is Nirvana.
Wisdom is knowing this.
